text: Some computer system variations of Klondike Solitaire permit you to move cards to and fro between the structures as well as the tableau. Composed by the exact same Eric that established the Eric's Solitaire Example and Eric's Ultimate Solitaire for Mac OS. You can drag as well as go down or touch cards to relocate them. http://solitairetimes.com/klondike/
